subject: A crystal golem crouching in a courtyard, its entire body composed of faceted prismatic crystal shards that catch and refract light into rainbow scatters across the stone pavement.
description: A humanoid golem made entirely of interlocking crystal facets crouches low in what appears to be a stone courtyard, weight forward, arms spread wide. The creature's surface refracts sunlight into scattered rainbow fragments that fall across the pavement beneath it. The crystal construction is dense and angular — there is no organic component visible, only the glittering, multi-faceted mineral body. Warm afternoon light behind and to the right deepens shadows in the crystal's crevices. Garden or architecture elements are faintly visible in the blurred background.
foreground: Crystal golem in crouched stance, prismatic light scattered on stone pavement
background: Sunlit courtyard, soft architectural shapes and foliage
emotion: Aggressive readiness — low crouching stance with arms splayed, weight forward
